query:
-- Insert all 10 Chaplaincy lessons
INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, scripture, lessonOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(150010, 'Introduction to Chaplaincy Ministry', 'Introduction to Chaplaincy Ministry - Foundational lesson exploring historical development, theological foundations, and contemporary expressions of chaplaincy across healthcare, military, corrections, education, and corporate environments. Learning Objectives: Understand historical development, identify biblical foundations, recognize unique role in secular settings, articulate theology of presence. Licensed to Larry Fisher', NULL, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(150010, 'Theological Foundations of Chaplaincy', 'Theological Foundations - Explores theological underpinnings of chaplaincy ministry. Covers Imago Dei, common grace, priesthood of all believers, theodicy and suffering. Learning Objectives: Articulate biblical theology of care, understand doctrine of common grace, apply theological reflection, integrate faith with professional practice. Licensed to Larry Fisher', NULL, 2, NOW(), NOW()),
(150010, 'Healthcare Chaplaincy', 'Healthcare Chaplaincy - Chaplains serve patients, families, and staff in acute care hospitals. Provides spiritual assessment, care planning, crisis intervention, end-of-life ministry, bereavement support. Settings include acute care, trauma centers, oncology, ICU, emergency departments. Learning Objectives: Understand chaplain role, learn spiritual assessment, develop end-of-life skills, navigate ethics committees. Licensed to Larry Fisher', NULL, 3, NOW(), NOW()),
(150010, 'Military Chaplaincy', 'Military Chaplaincy - Serves uniformed personnel across all service branches. Provides religious worship, sacramental ministry, counseling, moral guidance, family support, combat ministry. Addresses religious pluralism, combat ministry, chain of command, and moral injury. Learning Objectives: Understand unique military context, learn combat ministry, address moral injury, navigate chain of command. Licensed to Larry Fisher', NULL, 4, NOW(), NOW()),
(150010, 'Correctional Chaplaincy', 'Correctional Chaplaincy - Serves incarcerated populations providing religious services, faith formation, spiritual counseling, crisis intervention, suicide prevention, reentry preparation, family ministry. Addresses security considerations, institutional culture, non-judgmental presence, guilt and shame, restorative justice. Learning Objectives: Understand correctional environment, develop offender ministry skills, learn restorative justice, prepare for reentry. Licensed to Larry Fisher', NULL, 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(150010, 'Corporate and Workplace Chaplaincy', 'Corporate and Workplace Chaplaincy - Provides confidential spiritual and emotional support to employees. Addresses work-life balance, family concerns, grief and loss, addiction and recovery, career transitions. Demonstrates organizational benefits including reduced turnover, improved morale, enhanced culture. Learning Objectives: Understand corporate model, develop workplace ministry skills, navigate corporate culture, measure effectiveness. Licensed to Larry Fisher', NULL, 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(150010, 'Pastoral Care Skills and Crisis Intervention', 'Pastoral Care Skills and Crisis Intervention - Develops practical competencies in pastoral care, active listening, crisis intervention, and trauma-informed care. Covers active listening techniques, crisis assessment and intervention, safety planning, trauma principles, grief and loss ministry. Learning Objectives: Master active listening, develop crisis intervention skills, understand trauma-informed care, apply pastoral care. Licensed to Larry Fisher', NULL, 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(150010, 'Interfaith Sensitivity and Cultural Competence', 'Interfaith Sensitivity and Cultural Competence - Serves religiously and culturally diverse populations. Covers major faith traditions (Christianity, Judaism, Islam, Buddhism, Hinduism, Sikhism, indigenous spiritualities), cultural dimensions, cultural humility, interfaith facilitation and boundaries. Learning Objectives: Understand world religions, develop cultural competence, navigate interfaith encounters, provide appropriate spiritual care. Licensed to Larry Fisher', NULL, 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(150010, 'Professional Development and Certification', 'Professional Development and Certification - Clinical Pastoral Education (CPE) is foundational training. CPE units (400 hours = 1 unit), certification requirements (Master''s degree, 4 CPE units, faith endorsement), professional organizations (APC, NACC, ACPE, Military Chaplains, Correctional Chaplains, Healthcare Chaplaincy Network). Learning Objectives: Understand CPE, learn certification requirements, identify professional organizations, plan professional development. Licensed to Larry Fisher', NULL, 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(150010, 'Capstone: Integrating Chaplaincy Competencies', 'Capstone: Integrating Chaplaincy Competencies - Brings together all course competencies and knowledge. Develops personal chaplaincy philosophy, creates professional development plan, prepares for certification and ministry. Next steps include pursuing CPE certification, joining professional organizations, seeking mentorship, continuing theological education, and sustaining ministry through self-care. Learning Objectives: Integrate learning, develop chaplaincy philosophy, create professional plan, prepare for ministry. Licensed to Larry Fisher', NULL, 10, NOW(), NOW());
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute -- Insert all 10 Chaplaincy lessons
